channel.title: Americano on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Americano on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Long Black Coffee: What It Is, How to Make It, and Why It's Better Than an Americano
item.description: Long black coffee is Australia and New Zealand's favorite black coffee drink. Learn what makes it different, how to make it at home, and the correct ratio.

item.title: Americano vs Espresso: What's the Difference?
item.description: Americano vs espresso — same beans, completely different drinks. Learn how they're made, how they taste, when to choose each, and which is stronger.

item.title: Iced Americano Recipe: How to Make It at Home
item.description: Make a perfect iced americano at home with just espresso, ice, and cold water. Includes ratios, flavor variations, and pro tips for a smoother, less bitter drink.

item.title: Lungo vs Americano: What's the Difference?
item.description: Lungo and Americano are both larger, diluted espresso drinks — but they're made differently and taste different. Here's exactly how to tell them apart and make each one.

item.title: Americano vs Long Black: What's the Difference?
item.description: Americano and long black look identical but taste different. Here's why the order of pouring matters and which drink you should order.

item.title: Classic Espresso Drink Recipes: From Americano to Affogato
item.description: How to make every classic espresso drink at home. Detailed recipes for americanos, lattes, cappuccinos, cortados, macchiatos, and more.
